frontmatter.description: Distributed traces are arriving with orphan spans (parent_id missing in trace store)

signature.embedding_seed: tracing broken span orphan parent context propagation

body:
## When this fires
The trace store is receiving spans whose parent_id does not resolve. Causes: a service in the middle isn't propagating headers, a sampler is dropping the parent, or context is lost at an async boundary.

## Playbook
1. Pull orphan-span-sample to identify which service emits the orphan.
2. Read instrumentation-config to confirm propagation and sampler settings.
3. Check recent-deploys-svc for changes to async/queue boundaries that could lose context.
